title: Test Duration
description: Test execution time trends, bottleneck steps, and duration distribution

panels.title: Avg / P95 Test Duration Over Time

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', started_at) AS time, round(avg(epoch(ended_at - started_at)), 1) AS avg_s, round(quantile_cont(epoch(ended_at - started_at), 0.95), 1) AS p95_s FROM runs WHERE started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND ended_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT step_name, round(avg(epoch(step_ended_at - step_started_at)), 2) AS avg_step_s FROM measurement_values WHERE measurement_timestamp BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND step_ended_at IS NOT NULL AND step_started_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY step_name ORDER BY avg_step_s DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT epoch(ended_at - started_at) AS duration_s FROM runs WHERE started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND ended_at IS NOT NULL
